sharedUtilities: cn() — /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/lib/utils.ts (clsx + tailwind-merge twMerge; 68 imports across components as @/lib/utils)
class-variance-authority (cva) — external npm package used directly in 17 files (most ui/* variant defs + design/artifact-card.tsx); no local wrapper module

native-select className constants — /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/lib/native-select.ts (shared Tailwind class strings for native <select>, used by project/C4RealizesPanel, topology/RealizesSection, topology/TopologyInspector)

CSS custom-property tokens (--ink, --accent, --bg-elevated, --ink-muted, etc.) referenced inline in design/*, ui/workspec-mark.tsx, canvas-host/FourMechanicsBar.tsx; defined in /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/index.css and /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/styles

Other src/lib helpers components lean on (all /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/lib/): canvas-utils.ts, atlas-step.ts, attachment-utils.ts, pencil-ink.ts, cost-engine.ts, cost-catalog-model.ts, canvas-object-types.ts, terminal-api.ts, terminal-parser.ts, tether.ts

Portable generic hooks under /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/hooks/: use-mobile.tsx (viewport), use-toast.ts (shadcn toast store), use-theme.ts (theme preference) — imported by ui/sidebar, ui/toaster, and several composites
stateCoupling: Two-tier coupling. Tier 1 (decoupled): ui/ (57 shadcn-style primitives) and design/ (14 files) depend only on react, radix, cva, lucide, cn() from src/lib/utils.ts, and CSS-var tokens — the only exceptions are design/page-shell.tsx (wouter Link), ui/sidebar.tsx (use-mobile), ui/toaster.tsx (use-toast), all portable. Tier 2 (coupled): everything outside ui/ and design/ is progressively bound to app internals — 52 import statements of @workspace/api-client-react (generated React Query hooks AND response types) across ~40 files, 27 wouter imports (Link/useLocation/useRoute), ~35 app hooks in src/hooks/ (use-workspace, use-pull-requests, use-interaction-mode, use-presence, use-atlas-turn, use-topology-panel, etc.), and the @/canvas/* store/types/tools (a sibling dir excluded from this inventory) which hard-binds canvas-host/, topology/, prototype/, diagrams/C4Toolbar, and layout/right-sidebar/TopologyPanel. Three files (bugs/bug-detail-panel.tsx, board/ChangeRequestDetailPane.tsx, settings/mcp-sessions-card.tsx) bypass the generated client with raw fetch() + @tanstack/react-query. A notable middle band (~45 files marked needs-inversion) imports api-client-react only for row/response types or a single read hook and is structurally presentational.
testCoverage: Zero component tests. The only test file anywhere under /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec is /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/lib/cost-engine.test.ts (Vitest, pure cost-engine lib — not a component). No *.test.tsx, no *.spec.tsx, no __tests__ directories, no *.stories.* files, and no test/ directory in the workspec artifact (repo test conventions per CLAUDE.md put tests in artifacts/api-server/test/, which covers services, not this frontend).
notes: Complete coverage: 213 files inventoried, matching `find src/components -type f | wc -l` = 213 (includes .ts utils, type files, hooks, and one barrel that live inside the components tree).

Exclusion applied: /home/user/workspec/artifacts/workspec/src/canvas is a SIBLING of src/components (the canvas engine: store, types, shapes, tools) and was excluded per instructions; it is referenced from components as @/canvas/*. src/components/canvas/ and src/components/canvas-host/ ARE part of the components dir and are included.

Dependency-list conventions: intra-library imports (@/components/ui/*, @/components/design/*, sibling components in same dir) are omitted from both dep lists; @/lib/utils (cn) is omitted (listed under sharedUtilities); wouter and @workspace/api-client-react are classified under workspecInternalDeps per task definition even though they are npm packages, because they bind components to the app router and generated API client.

Entries marked 'clean' that still list a @/lib/* item in workspecInternalDeps (e.g. StepRow→atlas-step, AttachmentCard/MessageComposer→attachment-utils, ScenarioDetailDialog→canvas-utils) only need that pure helper module vendored alongside — no prop/slot refactor observed in the import graph.
layout/marketing-layout.tsx is a 1-line empty stub containing only `export {}`.

Raw fetch() + @tanstack/react-query bypassing the generated client (contrary to the repo's stated frontend pattern) found in: bugs/bug-detail-panel.tsx (2 call sites), board/ChangeRequestDetailPane.tsx (1), settings/mcp-sessions-card.tsx (3).
design/index.ts is a barrel re-exporting all 13 design components; ui/ has no barrel (per-file imports).

kind values used: 'primitive' = single-purpose reusable control/token-level piece (all 57 ui/* plus type-badge, chat Avatar, design atoms, EditableLabel); 'composite' = multi-part reusable widget built from primitives; 'app-specific' = screen chunk/panel/view/context bound to WorkSpec domain shapes even when import-clean.
Verdict distribution: 116 clean (57 of them ui/, 13 design/), 39 needs-inversion, 58 not-extractable. Original scout note understated clean/overstated others; corrected at commit time (S0 review).
Grep artifacts 'working…' (DiscoverySidebar) and ' : ' (TopologyInspector) matched string literals in code, not real imports — excluded from dep lists.
